scripts.test:firefox:proxy: cross-env HTTP_PROXY=http://localhost:8080 HTTPS_PROXY=http://localhost:8080 NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1 cypress run --browser firefox
scripts.passive-scan: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));if(!fs.existsSync('reports/passive-reports')){fs.mkdirSync('reports/passive-reports',{recursive:true});}(async()=>{execSync('npm run test:firefox:proxy',{stdio:'inherit'});let done=false;while(!done){let res=execSync('curl -s http://localhost:8080/JSON/pscan/view/recordsToScan/').toString();let remaining=JSON.parse(res).recordsToScan;if(remaining==0){done=true;}else{console.log('Passive scan running... Remaining: '+remaining);await sleep(1000);}}execSync('curl http://localhost:8080/OTHER/core/other/htmlreport/ -o reports/passive-reports/passive-report.html',{stdio:'inherit'});})();"
scripts.spider: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const base=require('./cypress.config.js').e2e.baseUrl;const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));if(!fs.existsSync('reports/spider-reports')){fs.mkdirSync('reports/spider-reports',{recursive:true});}(async()=>{execSync(`curl http://localhost:8080/JSON/spider/action/scan/?url=${base}`,{stdio:'inherit'});let done=false;while(!done){let res=execSync('curl -s http://localhost:8080/JSON/spider/view/status/?scanId=0').toString();let status=JSON.parse(res).status;if(status==100){done=true;}else{console.log('Spider running... '+status+'%');await sleep(5000);}}execSync('curl http://localhost:8080/OTHER/core/other/htmlreport/ -o reports/spider-reports/spider-report.html',{stdio:'inherit'});})();"
scripts.active-scan: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const base=require('./cypress.config.js').e2e.baseUrl;const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));if(!fs.existsSync('reports/active-reports')){fs.mkdirSync('reports/active-reports',{recursive:true});}(async()=>{execSync(`curl http://localhost:8080/JSON/ascan/action/scan/?url=${base}`,{stdio:'inherit'});let done=false;while(!done){let res=execSync('curl -s http://localhost:8080/JSON/ascan/view/status/?scanId=0').toString();let status=JSON.parse(res).status;if(status==100){done=true;}else{console.log('Active scan running... '+status+'%');await sleep(10000);}}execSync('curl http://localhost:8080/OTHER/core/other/htmlreport/ -o reports/active-reports/active-report.html',{stdio:'inherit'});})();"
scripts.security-test: npm run spider && npm run passive-scan && npm run active-scan
